  display: none!important;

.checkbox-section-custom input[type=checkbox] + label:before {
    content: "\2714";
    border: 0.1em solid #fff;
    border-radius: 0.2em;
    display: inline-block;
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
    padding-left: 0;
    padding-bottom: 0;
    margin-right: 0.2em;
    vertical-align: bottom;
    color: transparent;
    transition: .2s;
    position: absolute;
    left: 0;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    line-height: 20px;
    margin-top: 2px;
}



input[type=checkbox]:checked + label:before {
  background-color: #FFAEB9;
  border-color: #FFAEB9!important;;
  color: #fff;
}

.checkbox-section-custom input[type=checkbox]:disabled + label:before {
  border-color: #fff;
}

  border-color: #F7C28F;

<p id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-9ebf9005" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-9ebf9005">After, you will work with admissions to schedule a date and time to admit into treatment with us or receive a treatment referral.</p>

<h2 id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-db73c5e3" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-db73c5e3">Get in touch, we will get back to you to discuss your treatment options</h2>



<p id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-26c7daee" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-26c7daee">If you are looking for substance abuse treatment near Malibu, our admissions team can help connect you with quality care in the area. While our Mabliu Detox locations are closing, Aliya Health Group offers other tranquil and healing locations in and around Southern California for those seeking recovery from addiction.<br><br>If our alcohol and drug rehab centers aren’t the right fit, we are happy to provide a treatment referral to a quality facility that is!</p>
</div>

				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>

pages.rawText:
Maintenance Page - Malibu Detox & Residential Treatment Center - Alcohol and Drug Addiction Rehab in Los Angeles, California 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

AN ALIYA HEALTH GROUP MESSAGE

Malibu’s Doors Are Closing

To assist you in finding the care and support you need, we encourage you to explore our other treatment options near you. 

 Find Help Near You! 

 
 
 
 

Call Us

First, to begin the admissions process, you can reach out and tell us about your reasons for calling.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Discuss Your Needs

Next, you can complete a pre-assessment evaluation to determine your needs and preferences for treatment.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Schedule Care

After, you will work with admissions to schedule a date and time to admit into treatment with us or receive a treatment referral.

Get in touch, we will get back to you to discuss your treatment options

If you are looking for substance abuse treatment near Malibu, our admissions team can help connect you with quality care in the area. While our Mabliu Detox locations are closing, Aliya Health Group offers other tranquil and healing locations in and around Southern California for those seeking recovery from addiction.

If our alcohol and drug rehab centers aren’t the right fit, we are happy to provide a treatment referral to a quality facility that is!

 

 

 
" * " indicates required fields

 
 

 Δ 
 
 

 

 

 Instagram 
 

This field is for validation purposes and should be left unchanged.

 First Name * 
 

 Last Name * 
 

 Phone * 
 

 Email 

 
 

 Message 
 

 chekbox * 

 
 By clicking this box you provide express written consent indicating a willingness for us to call you. We never share your information. Privacy Policy/TOS 
 

 
 By clicking this box you provide express written consent to contact you via SMS no more than 2-4 times/month. Standard messaging and data rates may apply. Text STOP to opt-out anytime. Privacy Policy/TOS 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

“…My stay in residential addiction treatment at Malibu Detox was instrumental in my sobriety today. The staff and facility are both wonderful and I felt like I was on vacation. I was able to heal in peace and come back to real life refreshed and ready to start anew…”

Mark K – Malibu alumni

 

Copyright 2025 – Malibudetox.com

 

 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Have Questions?

Call Now for Help.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 (424) 234-2027

.checkbox-section-custom input[type=checkbox] + label {

  cursor: pointer;
  padding:0 0 0 30px;
  font-family: 'Montserrat';
    position: relative;

  display: none!important;
}

.checkbox-section-custom input[type=checkbox] + label:before {
    content: "\2714";
    border: 0.1em solid #fff;
    border-radius: 0.2em;
    display: inline-block;
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
    padding-left: 0;
    padding-bottom: 0;
    margin-right: 0.2em;
    vertical-align: bottom;
    color: transparent;
    transition: .2s;
    position: absolute;
    left: 0;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    line-height: 20px;
    margin-top: 2px;
}



input[type=checkbox]:checked + label:before {
  background-color: #FFAEB9;
  border-color: #FFAEB9!important;;
  color: #fff;
}

.checkbox-section-custom input[type=checkbox]:disabled + label:before {
  border-color: #fff;
}

  background-color: #F7C28F;
  border-color: #F7C28F;

<p id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-9ebf9005" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-9ebf9005">After, you will work with admissions to schedule a date and time to admit into treatment with us or receive a treatment referral.</p>

<h2 id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-db73c5e3" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-db73c5e3">Get in touch, we will get back to you to discuss your treatment options</h2>



<p id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-26c7daee" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-26c7daee">If you are looking for substance abuse treatment near Malibu, our admissions team can help connect you with quality care in the area. While our Mabliu Detox locations are closing, Aliya Health Group offers other tranquil and healing locations in and around Southern California for those seeking recovery from addiction.<br><br>If our alcohol and drug rehab centers aren’t the right fit, we are happy to provide a treatment referral to a quality facility that is!</p>
</div>

				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>

pages.rawText:
Maintenance Page - Malibu Detox & Residential Treatment Center - Alcohol and Drug Addiction Rehab in Los Angeles, California 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

AN ALIYA HEALTH GROUP MESSAGE

Malibu’s Doors Are Closing

To assist you in finding the care and support you need, we encourage you to explore our other treatment options near you. 

 Find Help Near You! 

 
 
 
 

Call Us

First, to begin the admissions process, you can reach out and tell us about your reasons for calling.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Discuss Your Needs

Next, you can complete a pre-assessment evaluation to determine your needs and preferences for treatment.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Schedule Care

After, you will work with admissions to schedule a date and time to admit into treatment with us or receive a treatment referral.

Get in touch, we will get back to you to discuss your treatment options

If you are looking for substance abuse treatment near Malibu, our admissions team can help connect you with quality care in the area. While our Mabliu Detox locations are closing, Aliya Health Group offers other tranquil and healing locations in and around Southern California for those seeking recovery from addiction.

If our alcohol and drug rehab centers aren’t the right fit, we are happy to provide a treatment referral to a quality facility that is!

 

 

 
" * " indicates required fields

 
 

 Δ 
 
 

 

 

 Instagram 
 

This field is for validation purposes and should be left unchanged.

 First Name * 
 

 Last Name * 
 

 Phone * 
 

 Email 

 
 

 Message 
 

 chekbox * 

 
 By clicking this box you provide express written consent indicating a willingness for us to call you. We never share your information. Privacy Policy/TOS 
 

 
 By clicking this box you provide express written consent to contact you via SMS no more than 2-4 times/month. Standard messaging and data rates may apply. Text STOP to opt-out anytime. Privacy Policy/TOS 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

“…My stay in residential addiction treatment at Malibu Detox was instrumental in my sobriety today. The staff and facility are both wonderful and I felt like I was on vacation. I was able to heal in peace and come back to real life refreshed and ready to start anew…”

Mark K – Malibu alumni

 

Copyright 2025 – Malibudetox.com

 

 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Have Questions?

Call Now for Help.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 (424) 234-2027

.checkbox-section-custom input[type=checkbox] + label {

  cursor: pointer;
  padding:0 0 0 30px;
  font-family: 'Montserrat';
    position: relative;

  display: none!important;
}

.checkbox-section-custom input[type=checkbox] + label:before {
    content: "\2714";
    border: 0.1em solid #fff;
    border-radius: 0.2em;
    display: inline-block;
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
    padding-left: 0;
    padding-bottom: 0;
    margin-right: 0.2em;
    vertical-align: bottom;
    color: transparent;
    transition: .2s;
    position: absolute;
    left: 0;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    line-height: 20px;
    margin-top: 2px;
}



input[type=checkbox]:checked + label:before {
  background-color: #FFAEB9;
  border-color: #FFAEB9!important;;
  color: #fff;
}

.checkbox-section-custom input[type=checkbox]:disabled + label:before {
  border-color: #fff;
}

  background-color: #F7C28F;
  border-color: #F7C28F;

<p id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-9ebf9005" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-9ebf9005">After, you will work with admissions to schedule a date and time to admit into treatment with us or receive a treatment referral.</p>

<h2 id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-db73c5e3" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-db73c5e3">Get in touch, we will get back to you to discuss your treatment options</h2>



<p id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-26c7daee" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-26c7daee">If you are looking for substance abuse treatment near Malibu, our admissions team can help connect you with quality care in the area. While our Mabliu Detox locations are closing, Aliya Health Group offers other tranquil and healing locations in and around Southern California for those seeking recovery from addiction.<br><br>If our alcohol and drug rehab centers aren’t the right fit, we are happy to provide a treatment referral to a quality facility that is!</p>
</div>

				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>

pages.rawText:
Maintenance Page - Malibu Detox & Residential Treatment Center - Alcohol and Drug Addiction Rehab in Los Angeles, California 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

AN ALIYA HEALTH GROUP MESSAGE

Malibu’s Doors Are Closing

To assist you in finding the care and support you need, we encourage you to explore our other treatment options near you. 

 Find Help Near You! 

 
 
 
 

Call Us

First, to begin the admissions process, you can reach out and tell us about your reasons for calling.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Discuss Your Needs

Next, you can complete a pre-assessment evaluation to determine your needs and preferences for treatment.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Schedule Care

After, you will work with admissions to schedule a date and time to admit into treatment with us or receive a treatment referral.

Get in touch, we will get back to you to discuss your treatment options

If you are looking for substance abuse treatment near Malibu, our admissions team can help connect you with quality care in the area. While our Mabliu Detox locations are closing, Aliya Health Group offers other tranquil and healing locations in and around Southern California for those seeking recovery from addiction.

If our alcohol and drug rehab centers aren’t the right fit, we are happy to provide a treatment referral to a quality facility that is!

 

 

 
" * " indicates required fields

 
 

 Δ 
 
 

 

 

 Instagram 
 

This field is for validation purposes and should be left unchanged.

 First Name * 
 

 Last Name * 
 

 Phone * 
 

 Email 

 
 

 Message 
 

 chekbox * 

 
 By clicking this box you provide express written consent indicating a willingness for us to call you. We never share your information. Privacy Policy/TOS 
 

 
 By clicking this box you provide express written consent to contact you via SMS no more than 2-4 times/month. Standard messaging and data rates may apply. Text STOP to opt-out anytime. Privacy Policy/TOS 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

“…My stay in residential addiction treatment at Malibu Detox was instrumental in my sobriety today. The staff and facility are both wonderful and I felt like I was on vacation. I was able to heal in peace and come back to real life refreshed and ready to start anew…”

Mark K – Malibu alumni

 

Copyright 2025 – Malibudetox.com

 

 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Have Questions?

Call Now for Help.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 (424) 234-2027

.checkbox-section-custom input[type=checkbox] + label {

  cursor: pointer;
  padding:0 0 0 30px;
  font-family: 'Montserrat';
    position: relative;

  display: none!important;
}

.checkbox-section-custom input[type=checkbox] + label:before {
    content: "\2714";
    border: 0.1em solid #fff;
    border-radius: 0.2em;
    display: inline-block;
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
    padding-left: 0;
    padding-bottom: 0;
    margin-right: 0.2em;
    vertical-align: bottom;
    color: transparent;
    transition: .2s;
    position: absolute;
    left: 0;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    line-height: 20px;
    margin-top: 2px;
}



input[type=checkbox]:checked + label:before {
  background-color: #FFAEB9;
  border-color: #FFAEB9!important;;
  color: #fff;
}

.checkbox-section-custom input[type=checkbox]:disabled + label:before {
  border-color: #fff;
}

  background-color: #F7C28F;
  border-color: #F7C28F;

<p id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-9ebf9005" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-9ebf9005">After, you will work with admissions to schedule a date and time to admit into treatment with us or receive a treatment referral.</p>

<h2 id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-db73c5e3" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-db73c5e3">Get in touch, we will get back to you to discuss your treatment options</h2>



<p id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-26c7daee" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-26c7daee">If you are looking for substance abuse treatment near Malibu, our admissions team can help connect you with quality care in the area. While our Mabliu Detox locations are closing, Aliya Health Group offers other tranquil and healing locations in and around Southern California for those seeking recovery from addiction.<br><br>If our alcohol and drug rehab centers aren’t the right fit, we are happy to provide a treatment referral to a quality facility that is!</p>
</div>

				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>

pages.rawText:
Maintenance Page - Malibu Detox & Residential Treatment Center - Alcohol and Drug Addiction Rehab in Los Angeles, California 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

AN ALIYA HEALTH GROUP MESSAGE

Malibu’s Doors Are Closing

To assist you in finding the care and support you need, we encourage you to explore our other treatment options near you. 

 Find Help Near You! 

 
 
 
 

Call Us

First, to begin the admissions process, you can reach out and tell us about your reasons for calling.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Discuss Your Needs

Next, you can complete a pre-assessment evaluation to determine your needs and preferences for treatment.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Schedule Care

After, you will work with admissions to schedule a date and time to admit into treatment with us or receive a treatment referral.

Get in touch, we will get back to you to discuss your treatment options

If you are looking for substance abuse treatment near Malibu, our admissions team can help connect you with quality care in the area. While our Mabliu Detox locations are closing, Aliya Health Group offers other tranquil and healing locations in and around Southern California for those seeking recovery from addiction.

If our alcohol and drug rehab centers aren’t the right fit, we are happy to provide a treatment referral to a quality facility that is!

 

 

 
" * " indicates required fields

 
 

 Δ 
 
 

 

 

 Instagram 
 

This field is for validation purposes and should be left unchanged.

 First Name * 
 

 Last Name * 
 

 Phone * 
 

 Email 

 
 

 Message 
 

 chekbox * 

 
 By clicking this box you provide express written consent indicating a willingness for us to call you. We never share your information. Privacy Policy/TOS 
 

 
 By clicking this box you provide express written consent to contact you via SMS no more than 2-4 times/month. Standard messaging and data rates may apply. Text STOP to opt-out anytime. Privacy Policy/TOS 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

“…My stay in residential addiction treatment at Malibu Detox was instrumental in my sobriety today. The staff and facility are both wonderful and I felt like I was on vacation. I was able to heal in peace and come back to real life refreshed and ready to start anew…”

Mark K – Malibu alumni

 

Copyright 2025 – Malibudetox.com

 

 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Have Questions?

Call Now for Help.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 (424) 234-2027

.checkbox-section-custom input[type=checkbox] + label {

  cursor: pointer;
  padding:0 0 0 30px;
  font-family: 'Montserrat';
    position: relative;

  display: none!important;
}

.checkbox-section-custom input[type=checkbox] + label:before {
    content: "\2714";
    border: 0.1em solid #fff;
    border-radius: 0.2em;
    display: inline-block;
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
    padding-left: 0;
    padding-bottom: 0;
    margin-right: 0.2em;
    vertical-align: bottom;
    color: transparent;
    transition: .2s;
    position: absolute;
    left: 0;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    line-height: 20px;
    margin-top: 2px;
}



input[type=checkbox]:checked + label:before {
  background-color: #FFAEB9;
  border-color: #FFAEB9!important;;
  color: #fff;
}

.checkbox-section-custom input[type=checkbox]:disabled + label:before {
  border-color: #fff;
}

  background-color: #F7C28F;
  border-color: #F7C28F;

<p id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-9ebf9005" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-9ebf9005">After, you will work with admissions to schedule a date and time to admit into treatment with us or receive a treatment referral.</p>

<h2 id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-db73c5e3" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-db73c5e3">Get in touch, we will get back to you to discuss your treatment options</h2>



<p id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-26c7daee" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-26c7daee">If you are looking for substance abuse treatment near Malibu, our admissions team can help connect you with quality care in the area. While our Mabliu Detox locations are closing, Aliya Health Group offers other tranquil and healing locations in and around Southern California for those seeking recovery from addiction.<br><br>If our alcohol and drug rehab centers aren’t the right fit, we are happy to provide a treatment referral to a quality facility that is!</p>
</div>

				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>

pages.rawText:
Maintenance Page - Malibu Detox & Residential Treatment Center - Alcohol and Drug Addiction Rehab in Los Angeles, California 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

AN ALIYA HEALTH GROUP MESSAGE

Malibu’s Doors Are Closing

To assist you in finding the care and support you need, we encourage you to explore our other treatment options near you. 

 Find Help Near You! 

 
 
 
 

Call Us

First, to begin the admissions process, you can reach out and tell us about your reasons for calling.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Discuss Your Needs

Next, you can complete a pre-assessment evaluation to determine your needs and preferences for treatment.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Schedule Care

After, you will work with admissions to schedule a date and time to admit into treatment with us or receive a treatment referral.

Get in touch, we will get back to you to discuss your treatment options

If you are looking for substance abuse treatment near Malibu, our admissions team can help connect you with quality care in the area. While our Mabliu Detox locations are closing, Aliya Health Group offers other tranquil and healing locations in and around Southern California for those seeking recovery from addiction.

If our alcohol and drug rehab centers aren’t the right fit, we are happy to provide a treatment referral to a quality facility that is!

 

 

 
" * " indicates required fields

 
 

 Δ 
 
 

 

 

 Instagram 
 

This field is for validation purposes and should be left unchanged.

 First Name * 
 

 Last Name * 
 

 Phone * 
 

 Email 

 
 

 Message 
 

 chekbox * 

 
 By clicking this box you provide express written consent indicating a willingness for us to call you. We never share your information. Privacy Policy/TOS 
 

 
 By clicking this box you provide express written consent to contact you via SMS no more than 2-4 times/month. Standard messaging and data rates may apply. Text STOP to opt-out anytime. Privacy Policy/TOS 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

“…My stay in residential addiction treatment at Malibu Detox was instrumental in my sobriety today. The staff and facility are both wonderful and I felt like I was on vacation. I was able to heal in peace and come back to real life refreshed and ready to start anew…”

Mark K – Malibu alumni

 

Copyright 2025 – Malibudetox.com

 

 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Have Questions?

Call Now for Help.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 (424) 234-2027

.checkbox-section-custom input[type=checkbox] + label {

  cursor: pointer;
  padding:0 0 0 30px;
  font-family: 'Montserrat';
    position: relative;

  display: none!important;
}

.checkbox-section-custom input[type=checkbox] + label:before {
    content: "\2714";
    border: 0.1em solid #fff;
    border-radius: 0.2em;
    display: inline-block;
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
    padding-left: 0;
    padding-bottom: 0;
    margin-right: 0.2em;
    vertical-align: bottom;
    color: transparent;
    transition: .2s;
    position: absolute;
    left: 0;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    line-height: 20px;
    margin-top: 2px;
}



input[type=checkbox]:checked + label:before {
  background-color: #FFAEB9;
  border-color: #FFAEB9!important;;
  color: #fff;
}

.checkbox-section-custom input[type=checkbox]:disabled + label:before {
  border-color: #fff;
}

  background-color: #F7C28F;
  border-color: #F7C28F;

<p id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-9ebf9005" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-9ebf9005">After, you will work with admissions to schedule a date and time to admit into treatment with us or receive a treatment referral.</p>

<h2 id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-db73c5e3" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-db73c5e3">Get in touch, we will get back to you to discuss your treatment options</h2>



<p id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-26c7daee" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-26c7daee">If you are looking for substance abuse treatment near Malibu, our admissions team can help connect you with quality care in the area. While our Mabliu Detox locations are closing, Aliya Health Group offers other tranquil and healing locations in and around Southern California for those seeking recovery from addiction.<br><br>If our alcohol and drug rehab centers aren’t the right fit, we are happy to provide a treatment referral to a quality facility that is!</p>
</div>

				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>

pages.rawText:
Maintenance Page - Malibu Detox & Residential Treatment Center - Alcohol and Drug Addiction Rehab in Los Angeles, California 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

AN ALIYA HEALTH GROUP MESSAGE

Malibu’s Doors Are Closing

To assist you in finding the care and support you need, we encourage you to explore our other treatment options near you. 

 Find Help Near You! 

 
 
 
 

Call Us

First, to begin the admissions process, you can reach out and tell us about your reasons for calling.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Discuss Your Needs

Next, you can complete a pre-assessment evaluation to determine your needs and preferences for treatment.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Schedule Care

After, you will work with admissions to schedule a date and time to admit into treatment with us or receive a treatment referral.

Get in touch, we will get back to you to discuss your treatment options

If you are looking for substance abuse treatment near Malibu, our admissions team can help connect you with quality care in the area. While our Mabliu Detox locations are closing, Aliya Health Group offers other tranquil and healing locations in and around Southern California for those seeking recovery from addiction.

If our alcohol and drug rehab centers aren’t the right fit, we are happy to provide a treatment referral to a quality facility that is!

 

 

 
" * " indicates required fields

 
 

 Δ 
 
 

 

 

 Instagram 
 

This field is for validation purposes and should be left unchanged.

 First Name * 
 

 Last Name * 
 

 Phone * 
 

 Email 

 
 

 Message 
 

 chekbox * 

 
 By clicking this box you provide express written consent indicating a willingness for us to call you. We never share your information. Privacy Policy/TOS 
 

 
 By clicking this box you provide express written consent to contact you via SMS no more than 2-4 times/month. Standard messaging and data rates may apply. Text STOP to opt-out anytime. Privacy Policy/TOS 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

“…My stay in residential addiction treatment at Malibu Detox was instrumental in my sobriety today. The staff and facility are both wonderful and I felt like I was on vacation. I was able to heal in peace and come back to real life refreshed and ready to start anew…”

Mark K – Malibu alumni

 

Copyright 2025 – Malibudetox.com

 

 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Have Questions?

Call Now for Help.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 (424) 234-2027
